option.mobconversion.threatDetectionRadi: Distance in blocks to detect hostile monsters.
option.mobconversion.bellDetectionRadius: Distance in blocks for bell searching.
option.mobconversion.scanCooldownTicks.t: Interval in ticks between threat checks (20 ticks = 1 second).
option.mobconversion.artificialVillagePo: Distance in blocks to detect artificial villages via Points of Interest.
option.mobconversion.villageScope.toolti: Scope of villages permitted for conversion. ANYWHERE means it works outside villages.
option.mobconversion.requireBell.tooltip: If enabled, requires a nearby bell for conversion in natural villages.
Maximum number of converted/spawned entities of the same type in an area.
Search radius to count existing entities for limit checks.
option.mobconversion.sharedCooldownRadiu: Radius in blocks where entities share the same conversion cooldown.
option.mobconversion.convertUntradedProf: Allow conversion of professionals who have never been traded with.
option.mobconversion.allowSelfConversion: Prioritize the entity that detected the threat for conversion.
option.mobconversion.spawnInsteadOfConve: If true, spawn a mob and keep the original entity (default behavior).
option.mobconversion.exemptSameVillageAt: Entity IDs exempt from attack-triggered conversion if in the same village.
option.mobconversion.convertibleEntityId: List of entity IDs that are eligible for conversion.
option.mobconversion.conversionParticles: If true, spawn particles when a conversion occurs.
option.mobconversion.conversionParticleD: Duration in ticks for conversion particles.
option.mobconversion.maxEntries.tooltip: Maximum entities allowed in the conversion pool.
option.mobconversion.defaultPriority.too: Default priority for selection (lower number = higher priority).
option.mobconversion.defaultDropLoot.too: Whether converted entities should drop loot by default.
option.mobconversion.defaultCooldownTick: Default cooldown in ticks before another conversion can occur.
option.mobconversion.defaultVillageScope: Default village scope override for entries.
Default bell requirement override for entries.
option.mobconversion.defaultMaxLimit.too: Default maximum limit of entities of the same type in an area override.
